caption:
Most renovation leads don't go cold. They go ignored.

You followed up once. Maybe twice. Then moved on.

But that lead? Still has a leaking roof. Still wants a new kitchen. Still needs someone to show up.

We built Leadvolver because dead leads aren't dead — they're just waiting.

AI reactivates your old contacts automatically. No manual work. No awkward calls.

Just booked jobs from people you already paid to get. 💰

Want to see how many leads you've left on the table?

Comment "REACTIVATE" and I'll show you.

Most renovation leads don't go cold. They get ignored.

You follow up once. Maybe twice. Then life happens.

That lead moves on. Books your competitor. Never looks back.

The money isn't in new leads.

It's in the ones already sitting in your CRM. 💰
